ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, UK, Europe, Japan) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken in the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "preferred_payment_methods" TEXT /* Preferred payment methods in the region */,
  "preferred_shipping_methods" TEXT /* Preferred shipping methods in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category (e.g., Footwear, Clothing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "description_multilingual" TEXT /* Description of the product in different languages */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Current stock status */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Expected date of restocking */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., footwear, clothing) */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL of the size chart image */,
  "description_multilingual" TEXT /* Description of the size in different languages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being converted */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for the equivalent size */,
  "equivalent_size" TEXT /* Equivalent size in the target region */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., footwear, clothing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Expected date of restocking */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last inventory update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the item price */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency of the customer */,
  "preferred_payment_methods" TEXT /* Preferred payment methods of the customer */,
  "preferred_shipping_methods" TEXT /* Preferred shipping methods of the customer */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "footwear_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each footwear size */,
  "length_of_foot" REAL /* Length of the foot in inches */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size equivalent */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size equivalent */,
  "europe_size" TEXT /* Europe size equivalent */,
  "japan_size" TEXT /* Japan size equivalent */,
  "insole_length" REAL /* Length of the insole in inches */,
  "heel_height" REAL /* Height of the heel in inches */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the foot in inches */,
  "description_multilingual" TEXT /* Description of the size in different languages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing size */,
  "chest_size" TEXT /* Chest size in inches */,
  "waist_size" TEXT /* Waist size in inches */,
  "hip_size" TEXT /* Hip size in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Length of the sleeve in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Width of the shoulder in inches */,
  "description_multilingual" TEXT /* Description of the size in different languages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being recommended */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the recommendation */,
  "measurement_data" TEXT /* JSON object with customer measurement data */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
